game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: This 2D sandbox adventure game allows players to explore vast, procedurally generated worlds, mine resources, craft items, build structures, and engage in combat against various enemies and bosses. The game features a dynamic day/night cycle influencing enemy spawns, and progression is driven by acquiring better tools, armor, and weapons through crafting and defeating bosses, which in turn unlock new materials, NPCs, and world events.
game_info.description: 2D Terraria is a simplified sandbox adventure game where you mine resources, craft items, and battle enemies. Explore a procedurally generated world with day/night cycles, gather wood and stone, craft tools and build structures to survive. Defeat enemies, mine deeper for better resources, and ultimately defeat the final boss to win the game.
game_info.controls:
LEFT ARROW: Move left
RIGHT ARROW: Move right
UP ARROW: Jump
DOWN ARROW: Duck (when on ground) or drop through platforms
SPACE: Use current tool/weapon
Z: Switch between tools (pickaxe, axe, sword)
SHIFT: Place blocks (when holding blocks)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause game
R: Restart game when on game over screen
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Testing basic game functionality and error-free gameplay using random sticky key actions.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Continuously press random movement and action keys, changing actions periodically to explore the game world and interact with elements.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game runs without errors, player responds to inputs, and basic game mechanics (movement, mining, combat) function properly.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Testing the win condition by implementing an optimal strategy to defeat the final boss.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Systematically mine resources, craft better equipment, build a shelter, and efficiently defeat the boss using optimal combat patterns.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully defeats the final boss and reaches the GAME_OVER_WIN state.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Testing resource gathering and crafting mechanics by focusing on mining and item creation.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Focus on mining different materials and crafting all available items in the game while avoiding combat when possible.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully mines various resources and crafts different tools, weapons and blocks without encountering errors.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Testing combat mechanics by focusing on fighting enemies during day and night cycles.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Seek out and engage with different enemy types using various weapons and combat techniques.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Combat system functions correctly with proper hit detection, damage calculation, and enemy behavior variation between day and night.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Testing building mechanics by constructing a complex structure.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Gather building materials and construct a multi-room shelter with platforms, walls, and a defensive perimeter.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Building system works properly with correct block placement, removal, and player interaction with built structures.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
